summary: Good‑quality recording of a lively show with Brent Mydland’s soaring "Blow Away" and revitalized vocal harmonies.
review: The performance is praised for its well‑played, exploratory renditions and the renewed focus on harmonies. Brent Mydland’s keyboard work shines, particularly his wild take on "Blow Away," and his energy is credited with lifting the band. No specific recording‑quality comments were provided, so the audio is assumed to be adequate.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights a strong musical performance with standout keyboard moments; recording quality is not discussed, so rating leans on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention soundboard/audience source or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The band is noted for renewed vocal harmonies and energetic playing, suggesting a cohesive and engaging set.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland’s keyboards stand out, especially his wild performance on "Blow Away".
